window_label: Discovery 2023-24 locked (540-cell mine, min-dPF); OOS 2025 + 2026 one-shot validated

universe.comment: MTF-eligible (leverageable) illiquid cohort; the edge dies monotonically illiquid->liquid

signal.comment: Cross-sectional daily capitulation: deep loser on a volume shock reverts over 2 days

entry_exit_mechanic.entry_mode: T+1_open (AMO BUY placed at day-t EOD; fills next open)
entry_exit_mechanic.exit_mode: T+1+K close (MOC SELL on exit_on_date = entry_date + hold_days trading days)
entry_exit_mechanic._catastrophe_comment: WIDE blowup guard only (gap/circuit tail), NOT a strategy exit; validated edge had no intra-hold stop
entry_exit_mechanic._ca_comment: exclude names with a split/bonus ex-date inside the K-day hold window (avoids qty/PnL corruption)

validation.cell_mine: 540 cells swept (n_disc>=200); 80 ship-eligible (Disc netPF>=1.20); 52 net-positive all 3 periods
validation.selection: most-stable by min dPF (stability over top-PF, per lessons)

confidence_card.regimes_positive: 6/7 (only loser post_tariff_consolidation PF 0.92; positive in war_vol_2026 1.57)

open_gates: survivorship: 2026-05 MTF list applied to 2023-25 (no historical MTF list, Lesson #27) -> PAPER is the production gate
tier-1 slippage realism (edge alive <=20bp, thins >=30bp) -> confirm in paper
post_tariff_consolidation low-vol regime weakness (PF 0.92) -> size for drawdown / regime-gate
